Shuswap Region, BC · Wagon Windows

Window Cleaning Prices — Shuswap Region

Wagon Windows publishes all prices upfront so you can budget without playing phone tag. Prices below cover the most common jobs across Salmon Arm, Blind Bay, Sicamous, and surrounding communities. Every job includes a streak-free guarantee.

Get an Instant Estimate (403) 837-5092

Residential Exterior Window Cleaning

ServicePrice
Small home (up to 10 windows)From $169
Medium home (11–20 windows)From $229
Large home (21+ windows)From $299
Interior + exterior add-on+$60 typical

Screen & Track Cleaning

ServicePrice
Screen cleaning (per screen)$6–$10
Track cleaning (per window)$4–$8
Full screen + track packageFrom $89

ServicePrice
Light mineral depositsFrom $149
Moderate calcium buildupFrom $229
Severe etching / multi-sessionQuoted on site

ServicePrice
Storefronts & small officesFrom $119
Multi-storey commercialQuoted on site

ServicePrice

ServicePrice

What's Included in Every Job

  • Streak-free squeegee finish on every pane
  • Sill and frame wipe-down included at no extra charge
  • Eco-friendly, biodegradable cleaning products
  • Pre-existing damage documented before we start
  • Streak-free guarantee — if you're not happy in 24 hours, we return free
  • Self-serve instant estimate — get your price in 2 minutes, no phone tag

Why We Publish Our Prices Upfront

Most window cleaning companies make you call for a quote — then hit you with a number you didn't budget for. We think that's backwards. Our pricing is built on a simple model: home size and window count. We've cleaned hundreds of homes across the Shuswap, so we know what a typical small, medium, and large job costs. Publishing those numbers saves you time and saves us the back-and-forth. If your property has unusual access requirements, a very high roofline, or features we haven't seen before, we'll tell you that when we arrive — not surprise you at the end.

Window count and storey height are the two biggest factors. A one-storey rancher with 12 windows costs less than a two-storey home with 20. Add-ons like interior cleaning, screen washing, track scrubbing, or hard water treatment each add time and materials. Access is the other variable — if a window requires extension ladders or is behind landscaping that makes it slow to reach, that's reflected in the quote. We never charge for the quote itself. If the on-site price differs meaningfully from our published range, we tell you before we start.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you charge for a quote?

No. Quotes are always free. For most homes we can give you a firm price based on square footage and a photo or quick description. For commercial properties or unusual layouts, we prefer a quick site visit.

Is there a minimum job fee?

Yes — our minimum is $119. This covers travel to your property and the first hour of work. Most residential jobs comfortably exceed this.

Do you offer discounts for repeat bookings?

Yes. Clients who book two or more visits per year (spring and fall is the most popular) receive priority scheduling and a 10% discount on their second visit. Commercial clients on annual contracts receive further reductions.

Are these prices for the Salmon Arm area only?

The prices above apply across our full service area — Salmon Arm, Blind Bay, Sorrento, Sicamous, Chase, Enderby, Armstrong, Eagle Bay, Celista, Scotch Creek, Grindrod, Spallumcheen, Swansea Point, and surrounding communities. Travel surcharges apply only for properties more than 60 minutes from Salmon Arm.
